content: Your account has been blocked. Click here to verify.
Checking Submit button after CSS fix

Dear Customer,

Your bank account has been temporarily suspended due to unusual activity. 
Please verify your account immediately to avoid permanent suspension.

Click here to verify: http://secure-bank-login-update.com

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in account closure.

Thank you,
Customer Support Team

Your package delivery has been delayed due to an incorrect address. 
Please update your shipping information immediately.

Update here: http://delivery-update-center.com

If not updated within 12 hours, the package will be returned.
